title: Provider contract: terrain DEM feed (v1)
description: Elevation point samples covering a city bounding box, sourced from SRTM 30 m (NASA public domain) and/or Copernicus DEM 30 m (ESA). Each record is one sampled elevation point with its lat/lon, elevation in metres, and provenance. The ingestor aggregates these points to H3 cells and derives slope, aspect, and ruggedness. TERRAIN_CLASS is NOT expected in this feed — it is computed by the agent layer after ingest.

provider_id.description: Stable identifier for the data provider (e.g. 'srtm_nasa', 'copernicus_dem_esa', 'open_elevation_api').

source_name.description: Human-readable source name (e.g. 'SRTM 30m DEM', 'Copernicus DEM GLO-30').

source_type.description: How the elevation data was acquired: sampled from a raster, fetched from an API, or read from a tile file.

dem_source.description: The specific DEM product used. Copernicus is preferred; SRTM is the fallback.

license.description: Data license. SRTM is public domain (NASA). Copernicus DEM is free under the Copernicus Data Space licence.

bbox.description: Bounding box for which elevation samples were collected.

resolution_m.description: Nominal horizontal resolution of the DEM in metres (typically 30 for SRTM/Copernicus).

void_fill_applied.description: Whether void-filling was applied to this dataset. Void-filled cells should reduce DATA_CONFIDENCE to 0.65.

source_metadata.description: Free-form provider metadata: tile IDs, acquisition date, processing version, etc.

samples.description: Array of individual elevation point samples covering the bbox.

lat.description: Latitude of the sample point in decimal degrees (WGS84).

lon.description: Longitude of the sample point in decimal degrees (WGS84).

elevation_m.description: Elevation above mean sea level in metres. Null indicates a DEM void at this point.

quality_flag.description: Data quality at this sample point. 'void_filled' means interpolated; 'suspected_artefact' means the value is anomalous (e.g. radar reflection off a tall building).

source_record_id.description: Optional tile or pixel identifier from the source DEM for traceability.

ingested_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime when AirOS ingested this record.
